title: An Act to Create a Limited-purpose License for Aquaculture Nursery and Husbandry Activities and to Clarify the Aquaculture Lease Amendment Process
last_house_action: 4/2/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/6/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: Received by the Clerk of the House on December 3, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on MARINE RESOURCES pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY On OBJECTION of Representative HEPLER of Woolwich REMOVED . The Committee Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Bill was READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (H-951) was READ . On motion of Representative HEPLER of Woolwich, House Amendment "A" (H-961) to Committee Amendment "A" (H-951) was READ and ADOPTED . Committee Amendment "A" (H-951) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-961) thereto was ADOPTED . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-951) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-961) thereto. Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Report READ and ACCEPTED , in concurrence. READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (H-951) READ Committee Amendment "A" (H-951) to Committee Amendment "A" (H-951) READ and ADOPTED. Committee Amendment "A" (H-951) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-961) thereto ADOPTED. Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED by Committee Amendment "A" (H-951) as Amended by House Amendment "A" (H-961) thereto in concurrence.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
